column11: SSP2-4.5 is an intermediate greenhouse gas emission scenario, with CO2 emissions around current levels until 2050, then falling but not reaching net zero by 2100.
SSP3-7.0 is a high greenhouse gas emission scenario, with CO2 emissions doubling by 2100.
SSP5-8.5 is a very high greenhouse gas emission scenario, with CO2 emissions tripling by 2075.
Soil Organic Carbon conserved by mangrove protection
